questions.question: Describe the topology of a point-to-point network with three nodes and duplex links between them. What are the advantages of using duplex links in this setup?
questions.hint: Explain the advantages of duplex links in a point-to-point network with three nodes

questions.question: What is the minimum number of duplex links required to establish a point-to-point network with three nodes? Explain your answer using the OSI model.
questions.hint: Refer to the OSI model to determine the minimum number of duplex links required

questions.question: Draw a diagram of a point-to-point network with three nodes and duplex links between them. Label the nodes and links correctly.
questions.hint: Use a diagramming tool to create a clear and accurate diagram
